name: ConvertTo-Json

options.name: -AsArray
options.description: Outputs the object in array brackets, even if the input is a single object.

options.name: -Compress
options.description: Omits white space and indented formatting in the output string.

options.name: -Depth
options.description: Specifies how many levels of contained objects are included in the JSON representation. The value can be any number from `0` to `100`. The default value is `2`. `ConvertTo-Json` emits a warning if the number of levels in an input object exceeds this number.

options.name: -EnumsAsStrings
options.description: Provides an alternative serialization option that converts all enumerations to their string representation.

options.name: -EscapeHandling
options.description: Controls how certain characters are escaped in the resulting JSON output. By default, only control characters (like newline) are escaped.

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: Specifies the objects to convert to JSON format. Enter a variable that contains the objects, or type a command or expression that gets the objects. You can also pipe an object to `ConvertTo-Json`.

description: Converts an object to a JSON-formatted string.
